3007772.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3007772.description: Master Chao visits the valley to oversee a Tournament. Shifu is convinced that Po and Master Chao want to replace him. Shifu's old enemy, Pai Mei, arrives in the middle of the tournament and threatens to destroy Shifu.

3022712.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3022712.description: When Po is asked to bring a young princess to the King of the Qidan to make a peace offering, they learn that an agreement between the two kingdoms will come at a cost.

3022772.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3022772.description: After the Croc Bandits steal Shifu's favorite ruby-encrusted statue of Oogway from Po and Tigress, the two warriors must team up to get the statue back and return it home.

3029543.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3029543.description: When Shifu's con-man father comes back into town, Po finds himself in the middle.

3044178.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3044178.description: When Po learns a kung fu move that can erase someone's short-term memory, he takes it too far.

3044789.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3044789.description: When a rhino comes to the Valley of Peace seeking to destroy the Dragon Warrior, Po tries to befriend him before he discovers Po's true identity.

3050264.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3050264.description: Po is excited when he discovers a kung fu prodigy, but starts to worry when people seem to prefer the new kid to their beloved Dragon Warrior.

3062464.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3062464.description: After Po unleashes an "impossible move," he's told that the most powerful fighter in the Valley of Peace always turns evil, and that's him!

3062528.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3062528.description: After Po disobeys Shifu's orders, the Hierarchy of the Sacred Onyx Council replaces Shifu with a new master who banishes the Furious Five and plans to destroy Shifu.

3069206.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3069206.description: Po befriends a band of dancers, unaware they're actually a band of traveling thieves.

3022871.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3022871.description: When Mantis returns to his hometown claiming to be the Dragon Warrior to impress his ex-fiancé, Po pretends to be his sidekick who doesn't know kung fu.

3022978.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3022978.description: Shifu tells the citizens of the Valley of Peace that whoever can defeat Po before sunset will become the new Dragon Warrior. When Hundun hears of the challenge, he returns to the village to claim the title.

3026012.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3026012.description: When the Furious 5 are all out of town and the Jade Palace is attacked, Po only has his dad and two old people to help him.

3042977.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3042977.description: Master Yao returns to the Jade Palace and announces that he's offering the Valley of Peace a one-day "Wonder and Wisdom Exchange." Anyone who brings him a new wonder will be allowed to ask him a single question.

3043038.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3043038.description: Po saves a girl from some bandits, only to learn that she's engaged to be married to the Dragon Warrior

3006372.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3006372.description: During a fight with Tong Fo, Po is struck by lightning, giving him the power to read minds.

3006425.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3006425.description: Thanks to Po, Hundun opens up his own noodle shop in the village, threatening to put Mr. Ping out of business.

3022136.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3022136.description: Po disobeys Shifu's orders and looks into the Mystical Mirror of Yin and Yang, creating two versions of himself: one good and one evil!

3022216.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3022216.description: When Temutai kidnaps a kung fu master, Shifu turns to Po for help.

3043635.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3043635.description: Po realizes he must select a trophy for the Hall of Heroes, but instead finds himself helping a young villager retrieve a rabbit doll that is much more important than it looks.

3043734.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3043734.description: Po disguises himself as the merciless villain, Tong Fo, to try and locate a hidden weapon.

3061937.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3061937.description: When Taotie tries to destroy the Jade Palace and fails, he is sent to prison while his son, Bian Zao, is left behind with Po, who acts like a big brother to the boy who thinks everything is lame!

3062030.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3062030.description: While repairs are being made to the noodle shop, Mr. Ping turns the training hall into a restaurant!

3081414.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3081414.description: When Shifu's con-man father comes back into town, Po finds himself in the middle.

3081472.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3081472.description: Po is excited when he discovers a kung fu prodigy, but starts to worry when people seem to prefer the new kid to their beloved Dragon Warrior.
